name: Centered CTA Hero
description: A centered hero section with eyebrow label, large headline with accent span, lede paragraph, and dual CTA buttons. Best for landing pages and marketing pages where a single strong message leads the page.

structure.html:
{{eyebrow}}

{{title_prefix}} {{title_accent}}

{{subtitle}}

{{cta_text}} {{secondary_text}}

subtitle.default: Lead with one strong promise. Let the page move from proof to invitation with calm, confident rhythm.

variants.name: single-cta
variants.description: Only the primary CTA button, no secondary

variants.name: dark
variants.description: Dark background variant for high-contrast hero sections
